text:

The graph solidifies into a complete architecture of glowing nodes — intelligence becoming structure. Documentary realism, shallow depth of field, electric blue plus deep navy palette. No text, no logos, ambient orchestral drone.

text:

Then told it what to create. And watched.

AI calling another AI. In the terminal. In real time.

That's the build. Follow @layer8culture for more.

text:
We let GitHub Copilot CLI connect to an image API through MCP — then watched it work.

AI operating AI. From the terminal.

This is what building with AI actually looks like. Not theory, not tutorials.

The real build, live on Tech Thursday.

Save this if you want to learn how. 🔵

Agent skills just changed the game.

GPT-5.6 shipped with stackable skill files — and it's the clearest signal yet that we're past prompts and into orchestration.

If you're not learning how skills-based AI works, you're building on last year's model.

Follow @layer8culture and stay ahead of the stack.
